text: How did today feel overall?
options: Great — things went well|Okay — mixed bag|Tough — it was hard

text: What made today feel great?
options: I achieved something I set out to do|I helped someone in a meaningful way|Something good just happened to me

text: What was the main texture of today?
options: Steady and routine — I got through it|Uncertain — I didn't know where I stood|Tired but functional — low energy day

text: What made today tough?
options: I was overwhelmed by tasks or decisions|There was a conflict with someone or a situation|I had low energy or couldn't focus

text: What did you accomplish — be specific, not vague.
Who did you help, and what did that require of you?
What was it, and did you have a role in making it happen?
Was the routine grounding or numbing today?
options: Grounding — I needed the stability|Numbing — I was on autopilot

text: What was the source of the uncertainty? Name it plainly.
What drained you most today? Be honest.
What was the main source of overwhelm?
options: Too many tasks stacked up|Emotions ran too high|Too many decisions with no clarity

text: The conflict was with...?
nextIds: A situation or system|Myself — I was in my own way

text: Where did the low energy come from?
options: Physical — sleep, body, health|Mental — too much to hold|Emotional — something is weighing on me

text: How much agency did you feel today?
options: I drove the day — I made choices and acted|Roughly half and half|The day drove me — I was reacting throughout

text: What choice or action are you most proud of today?
What's one moment where you wish you had acted differently?
What would have needed to be different for you to feel more in control?
Who or what did your energy and attention extend to today?
options: Mostly myself — internal day|Family or close friends|Colleagues or my team|Community or something beyond my immediate circle

text: Is focusing inward right for where you are — or do you want to expand your radius?
options: It's right — I needed to recharge|I'd like to give more to others going forward

text: Was the energy you gave them what they actually needed — or what was easy to give?
Did your interactions with colleagues feel meaningful or transactional today?
options: Meaningful — real collaboration happened|Transactional — just getting things done|A mix of both

text: What motivated you to extend your energy so far outward today?
What is one concrete thing you want to do differently tomorrow?
Name one thing — large or small — you are genuinely grateful for today.
Reflection complete. You showed up today — that matters.
